name: multica
description: The open-source managed agents platform. Turn coding agents into real teammates — assign tasks, track progress, compound skills.

name: deer-flow
description: An open-source long-horizon SuperAgent harness that researches, codes, and creates. With the help of sandboxes, memories, tools, skill, subagents and message gateway, it handles different levels of tasks that could take minutes to hours.

name: cline
description: Autonomous coding agent as an SDK, IDE extension, or CLI assistant.

name: cherry-studio
description: AI productivity studio with smart chat, autonomous agents, and 300+ assistants. Unified access to frontier LLMs

name: langflow
description: Langflow is a powerful tool for building and deploying AI-powered agents and workflows.

name: zeroclaw
description: Fast, small, and fully autonomous AI personal assistant infrastructure, any OS, any platform — deploy anywhere, swap anything 🦀

name: hermes-agent
description: The agent that grows with you

name: headroom
description: Compress tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks before they reach the LLM. 60-95% fewer tokens, same answers. Library, proxy, MCP server.

name: mem0
description: Universal memory layer for AI Agents

name: dify
description: Production-ready platform for agentic workflow development.
